name: SCP Foundation (Open Scenario)
description:
Based on the SCP Foundation bot by @Atlantaica, refined and rewritten—this time with an open scenario!!

(I'm sorry to the one guy that's been waiting for this for weeks HAHAHA)

Make your chats public cause I want to see them.

Also, if the bot isn't formatted correctly (i.e. using asterisks wrong) or gets some things wrong (like the wrong SCP number) just edit it. It's not something I can control :P

To publicize your chat, go to your chat, click (or tap) the three bars at the top (near where you enter your AI). In the drop-down menu that appears, you should see 'API Settings' and all of the settings there. Just toggle the switch next to "Public Chat." (It's not back yet -16/6/25)
creator: Ashley20
